llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan includes three main coverage categories: health (physical and mental under one plan called 'Standard Active Wellness Package'), property coverage, and travel coverage. The plan details show physical and mental coverage with preventive care, stress management, gym reimbursement, telemedicine, psychiatry services, family therapy, and executive health programs. These benefits match most closely with the LifeFirst Standard Plan for both physical and mental health (rating 9 each) because LifeFirst is the top-rated plan offering telemedicine, gym reimbursement, and family therapy alignment. The property coverage includes electronics coverage, liability protection, temporary accommodation, natural disaster coverage, and business equipment coverage, which matches LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 9). The travel coverage includes medical evacuation, trip cancellation, baggage protection, adventure sports coverage, extended stay coverage, and emergency coordination — this aligns best with the InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel (rating 10) since it explicitly covers adventure sports and business travel. The additional services such as telemedicine, wellness programs, and 24/7 emergency support correspond to add-ons already covered under the main plans (Telemedicine Services rating 8, and Adventure Travel Coverage rating 10). Thus, the final mapping corresponds to LifeFirst Standard Plan (health), LifeFirst Standard Coverage (property), and InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel).
